problem_statement: ReadOnlyWorkerRuntimeEnablementOperatorInputRequest names required runtime enablement evidence, but the workflow needs a read-only status ledger that records every requested input as unresolved without treating the ledger as evidence or authority.
success_criteria: the status ledger schema validates with exactly twelve status records derived from the operator input request
the validator rejects evidence submission, evidence acceptance, authority drift, runtime enablement drift, dispatch drift, missing records, and summary drift
the ledger keeps runtime enablement, dispatch, worker invocation, receipt emission, receipt append, terminal closure, connector calls, secret serialization, and success claims denied
non_goals: do not accept or reject evidence
do not dispatch or invoke a worker
do not emit or append runtime receipts
do not claim terminal closure or runtime success
constraints: Foundation Mode remains local-first and witness-only
status records must be generated from the operator input request
all effect-bearing worker runtime actions remain blocked
